market_regime.interpretation: Call walls are solid resistance. Put walls are solid support. Gamma flip acts as a pivot point. Expect mean reversion.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Subdued volatility expected due to massive positive Total GEX across all expirations, creating a pinning effect between major structural levels.
outlook.summary: Highly positive total GEX (6.37B) indicates dealers are heavily long gamma, actively suppressing volatility and stabilizing the market. A massive Call Wall Resonance at 711 acts as an impenetrable ceiling. However, the extremely high Put/Call Ratio and bearish volatility skew in 0DTE reveal strong underlying fear, making the 700 level a critical magnet and structural floor.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Absolute Call Wall across all three expirations (0DTE 32.5k, Weekly 15.2k, Monthly 38.7k). Heavy dealer short gamma exposure above this level creates an unbreakable ceiling.
CONFLUENCE: Massive Put OI in 0DTE (33.6k) combined with heavy Call OI in Monthly (38.3k) creates a high-friction magnetic support floor.
CONFLUENCE: Significant Put OI in 0DTE (27k) and Monthly (21.5k) establishes a secondary structural defensive line for market makers.
CONFLUENCE: Major Put Wall in Weekly (13.7k) and Monthly (41.3k) defining the absolute downside risk boundary for the current cycle.
CONFLUENCE: Significant Call OI in Weekly (10.2k) and Monthly (24.1k) caps any unexpected upside breakout attempts.
0DTE Gamma Flip. Spot trading just above this pivot indicates positive intraday dealer gamma, reinforcing stability and suppressing immediate volatility.
MONTHLY Gamma Flip. Transition zone for structural trend in the monthly timeframe, aligning closely with the 720 resistance cluster.

market_regime.interpretation: Call walls are solid resistance. Put walls are solid support. Gamma flip acts as a pivot point. Expect mean reversion.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Positive total GEX suppresses volatility; expect stable, range-bound conditions.
outlook.summary: Dealers are heavily long gamma across all expiries, creating a stabilizing environment that suppresses volatility. Heavy Call resistance confines the upside near 26900-27500, while structural Put supports and deep Call anchors establish a solid floor at 26200-26000. Expect mean-reversion price action within this defined range.

levels.motivazione: Significant Call OI across all three expiries (162/71/533) forms a structural ceiling.
Elevated 0DTE Call volume (879) and substantial MONTHLY OI (463) create immediate resistance.
Largest MONTHLY Call OI (1175) combined with 0DTE OI acts as a magnetic anchor.
Robust Put OI in 0DTE (130) and MONTHLY (44) provides a structural floor.
High Put volume (421) against OI (60) highlights an intraday hedging zone.
Heavy intraday Call volume (761) defines a psychological and immediate resistance.
Significant Put OI (126) acts as a major downside anchor and absolute support.
Massive WEEKLY Call OI (746) induces dealer hedging, providing gamma support.
